name: Riley
notes: Riley is in week two and is moving quickly through codebase orientation, but he has mostly learned from docs and async notes rather than direct team contact. I want to check whether he feels clear on ownership boundaries, incident expectations, and where to ask for context before making architecture assumptions. There is a risk he looks productive while building an internal map that differs from how the team actually operates. This check-in should identify missing context early and convert it into concrete onboarding support.
